tasks.description: Capture pre-upgrade baseline: run npm run build, type-check, lint, and test. Record all outputs for comparison. Generate SBOM of current dependency tree.
tasks.acceptance: Baseline captured with all passing

tasks.description: Create git branch for upgrade work. Run dependency audit (npm audit) and pin current package-lock.json as rollback reference.
tasks.acceptance: Branch created, audit baseline recorded

tasks.description: Upgrade core dependencies: next@^15, react@^19, react-dom@^19, @types/react@^19, @types/react-dom@^19, eslint-config-next to match. Update package.json and run npm install.
tasks.acceptance: Dependencies upgraded, install completes without peer dependency warnings

tasks.description: Run @next/codemod to apply Next.js 14→15 migration transforms: npx @next/codemod@latest next/14-to-15 . Review and commit each codemod output.
tasks.acceptance: All codemods applied. Changes reviewed and committed.

tasks.description: Update Supabase SSR client for Next.js 15 compatibility: verify @supabase/ssr version, update cookie handling in src/lib/supabase/client.ts, server.ts, and middleware.ts if needed. React 19 forwardRef/children typing fixes.
tasks.acceptance: Supabase auth works, middleware functions, type-check passes

tasks.description: Fix React 19 breaking changes: update useEffect cleanup, forwardRef patterns, children prop types across all 116 client components. Verify framer-motion compatibility.
tasks.acceptance: Build, type-check, lint, and all tests pass with React 19

tasks.description: Full QA pass on Next.js 15: npm run build, type-check, lint, test all pass. Spot-check 5 key routes render correctly.
tasks.acceptance: All gates pass. Commit as discrete checkpoint.

tasks.description: Upgrade: next@^16, eslint-config-next@^16. Run npm install. Run @next/codemod for next/15-to-16 transforms.
tasks.acceptance: Dependencies upgraded, codemods applied

tasks.description: Update build config for Turbopack compatibility: verify next.config.mjs works with Turbopack (images, headers, reactStrictMode). Fix any PostCSS/Tailwind pipeline issues.
tasks.acceptance: Build continues to work with Turbopack

tasks.description: Fix any remaining React 19 / Next.js 16 specific issues: edge middleware cookie changes, dynamic export patterns, server component rendering changes.
tasks.acceptance: All routes build and render without errors

tasks.description: Full QA pass on Next.js 16: build, type-check, lint, tests. Verify no high-severity dependency vulnerabilities remain.
tasks.acceptance: All gates pass. 0 high-severity CVEs in npm audit.

tasks.description: Manual smoke test of key routes: login, signup, dashboard, academy, story, boss, loot store, and all API routes. Check for console errors, hydration mismatches, and auth flow integrity.
tasks.acceptance: All routes load without console errors. Auth flows work end-to-end.

tasks.description: Run regression-sweep test_runner with scope:impact on changed API/auth files to verify no regressions. Run full test suite one final time.
tasks.acceptance: Full test suite passes. No regressions.
